content: Fintech ledger best practice for repeated partial withdrawals against one position: keep the position row immutable (original amount) and record every partial action as an append-only, immutable ledger entry (never edited/deleted); derive remaining balance as original minus sum(ledger entries) or maintain a running cached remaining column updated transactionally alongside the ledger insert. Use idempotency keys/unique constraints and row-level pessimistic locks (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE) to prevent overdrawing under concurrency.
